subcodes.first_line: He, glorified be His glory, must needs be patient, and unto God belongeth the power to reveal, and his it is to hold fast unto consultation and to act according to that which hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قوله جل جلاله له ان یصبر و لله ان یظهر و له ان یتمسک بالشوری و یعمل بما ظهر
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @personal instructions, @consultation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
